name: Ramen Noodle/Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop cabbage and onions.
2. Add cubed cooked chicken to the mixture.
3. Add chopped almonds and crushed ramen noodles.
4. Mix remaining ingredients: canola oil, sesame oil, sugar, rice wine vinegar, and pepper.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and mix well.
6. Serve chilled.
